news.summary: Cycurion, a prominent provider of IT cybersecurity solutions and AI, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, recently disclosed that Reginald S. Bailey, Sr., an industry veteran, has been appointed to its Board of Directors. The appointment became effective following the completion of the Company's latest de-SPAC transaction. Cycurion is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CYCU.
news.headline: Cycurion welcomes Reginald S. Bailey, Sr. to Board of Directors post de-SPAC, boosting industry expertise.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is predicted to shrink by 4.4% in 2020 due to the ongoing pandemic. The International Monetary Fund also mentioned that the global economy is expected to rebound in 2021 by a growth rate of 5.2%. The report highlighted that advanced economies are anticipated to contract by 5.8% in 2020, while emerging markets and developing economies are expected to see a decrease of 3.3%. The report emphasized that the employment rate in advanced economies is likely to drop by 7%, much higher than the 3.2% decline anticipated in emerging markets and developing economies. Additionally, the report stated that inflation globally is estimated to be around 3.8% in 2020.
news.headline: CERo Therapeutics gets key US Patent Office approvals for lead compound CER-1236 patent application.

news.summary: A company based in Henderson, Nevada, AEROCOR, known for aircraft sales and marketing, revealed that their recently established Helicopter Division has surpassed significant achievements earlier than expected, achieving these milestones within just nine months of launching. Initially aiming for five transactions, the division has already completed a remarkable number of successful deals.
news.headline: AEROCOR's Helicopter Division records record sales in 9 months, exceeding targets with over 5 transactions.

news.summary: Stephen Siderow, Founder and Managing Principal of Siderofsky Strategic Advisors LLC, has recently been appointed to the Advisory Council of NewVest. NewVest is a unique alternative investment platform that offers passive index funds for private markets. This announcement comes from New York on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Stephen Siderow joins NewVest Advisory Council for alternative investments platform.

news.summary: In Bozeman, Montana, Bridger Photonics, Inc. unveiled their Gas Mapping LiDAR™ (GML) technology as the winner of the "Overall Energy Technology Solution of the Year" at the CleanTech Breakthrough Awards. Bridger is renowned for its methane detection services in the oil and gas sector. The award, presented by CleanTech Breakthrough, an esteemed market intelligence entity, highlights innovative climate and clean tech solutions. Bridger's GML technology stood out among competitors, solidifying its position as a leader in emissions reduction.
news.headline: Bridger Photonics' Gas Mapping LiDAR technology named "Overall Energy Technology Solution of the Year" by CleanTech Breakthrough.

news.summary: Melville, New York - Intellicheck, Inc. disclosed that its CEO, Bryan Lewis, will be presenting at the Planet Microcap Showcase on April 22-24, 2025, at the Paris in Las Vegas, Nevada. The event will also feature CFO Adam Sragovicz and is scheduled to commence at 10:00 a.m. PT on Wednesday, April 23, 2025, in room Concorde B. Intellicheck, Inc. (Nasdaq: IDN) is known for its role as an identity company providing on-demand digital and physical identity validation solutions.
news.headline: Intellicheck (Nasdaq: IDN) to present at Planet Microcap Showcase in Las Vegas with CEO Bryan Lewis and CFO Adam Sragovicz.
Euro zone economy to grow 0.8% and 1.2% in 2025 and 2026, 0.9% and 1.3% in March poll - Poll.

news.summary: A well-known service provider will be incorporating SuperCom's electronic monitoring technology into the states of Wisconsin, Minnesota, and Michigan. This decision was announced in Tel Aviv, Israel on April 10, 2025. SuperCom, listed on NASDAQ as SPCB, is recognized worldwide for offering secure solutions within the fields of e-Government, IoT, and Cybersecurity.
news.headline: SuperCom expands U.S. market through contract with Midwestern monitoring service provider in 3 states.

news.summary: In Oklahoma City on April 10, 2025, the parent company of Bank7, Bank7 Corp. (NASDAQ: BSVN), disclosed unaudited financial results for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company expressed satisfaction with the performance in the beginning of 2025, showcasing remarkable...
news.headline: Bank7 Corp. (NASDAQ: BSVN) announces strong Q1 2025 earnings for Oklahoma City-based Bank7.

news.summary: A new programme, developed in partnership with Franklin Templeton, is set to allow for the use of crypto and tokenised money market funds as collateral. This initiative will involve prominent institutions like Brevan Howard Digital. The launch of the programme is scheduled for April 10, 2025 in Dubai, UAE.
news.headline: Standard Chartered and OKX launch collateral mirroring program with Franklin Templeton, enabling crypto and tokenized funds as collateral. Leading institutions like Brevan Howard Digital to join.

news.summary: A recent survey found that over 50% of individuals who do DIY projects consider the powered cordless screwdriver as the most essential tool in their collection. Additionally, nearly 30% of those surveyed identified their spouses as their preferred project partners. Rock music was revealed as the top choice for creating a focused working environment, with a considerable number of respondents opting for this genre.
news.headline: DIYers prefer cordless screwdrivers, value spouses as project partners. Rock music is top choice for motivation.

news.summary: Manulife has appointed Hung Ko as the new Global Head of Treasury and Investor Relations in an expanded role on the Toronto, Hong Kong stock exchanges as well as SEHK: 945. The announcement was made on April 10, 2025. Additionally, Stephanie Fadous has been named the Chief Actuary, taking over from Steve, effective May 9, 2025.
news.headline: Stephanie Fadous appointed as Chief Actuary at Manulife, effective May 9, 2025. Hung Ko named Global Head of Treasury in expanded role.

news.summary: In a recent national survey by National Crop Insurance Services (NCIS), it was revealed that a significant 91% of farmers invested in crop insurance to safeguard their operations in 2024. Interestingly, 90% of these farmers mentioned that they have consistently purchased insurance over the last five years. The survey also included feedback on the importance of key aspects of farm policy. Farmers provided ratings on a 10-point scale for three main components: crop insurance, direct government payments, and conservation assistance.
news.headline: 91% of farmers purchased crop insurance in 2024, with 90% doing so for the past 5 years. Survey by NCIS reveals highest importance.
Poll: European Central Bank to cut the deposit rate to 2.25% on April 17th, say 61 of 71 economists.

news.summary: In Dallas, a private equity firm, Paceline Equity Partners, LLC, has disclosed a $40 million preferred equity investment in Kassel Mechanical Holdings, LLC. Kassel is a privately owned company that specializes in facility services, particularly the installation and upkeep of mechanical, electrical, plumbing, fire suppression systems, and other essential building systems.
news.headline: Paceline Equity affilitate invests $40 million in Kassel Mechanical for facility services, including MEPF.

news.summary: Enhanced adherence now encompasses the Mavic 3 Pro and Mavic 3 Pro Cine, ensuring full Class C5 compliance for all main models in the M3 series.
news.headline: ParaZero extends Class C5 certification for SafeAir System to more DJI Mavic 3 models, including Mavic 3 Pro and Mavic 3 Pro Cine, covering the core M3 series.

news.summary: As per recent updates, around 300 individuals have been reported missing following a devastating earthquake that struck a region in Southeast Asia. The earthquake, with a magnitude of 7.2, resulted in significant damage to infrastructure and caused numerous casualties. At least 50 people have been confirmed dead, with rescue teams working tirelessly to locate and assist those who are missing or trapped. The local government has declared a state of emergency and is providing support to those affected by the disaster. The situation remains critical as the search and rescue efforts continue in the aftermath of this tragic event.
news.headline: CMCT corporation declares a reverse stock split, combining shares at a ratio of 1:10 to boost earnings.

news.summary: Valley Bank, based in Morristown, New Jersey, has recently published its fourth annual Proptech report. This comprehensive report offers a detailed analysis of the Proptech industry and forecasts its outlook through 2025. The report is a valuable resource for understanding the trends and dynamics shaping this sector.
news.headline: Valley Bank releases fourth annual Proptech report in Morristown, N.J., offering analysis and 2025 outlook.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, Emmeline Kuo and Tim Wei of Alliant Insurance Services have been honored as winners of the 2025 Break Out Awards by Business Insurance. This recognition highlights their exceptional contributions to the company and the industry.
news.headline: Alliant Insurance Services recognizes Emmeline Kuo and Tim Wei as 2025 Break Out Award winners.

news.summary: Wendy's has introduced exciting new options for Frosty lovers with the addition of special sauces and mix-ins, such as OREO cookie pieces and Pop-Tarts Crunchy Poppers pieces. The company, based in Dublin, Ohio, made this announcement on April 10, 2025. This innovation aims to enhance the Frosty experience, offering customers more delicious choices to enjoy.
news.headline: Wendy's launching new Frosty Swirls in April and Frosty Fusions in May, including OREO and Pop-Tarts Crunchy Poppers.

news.summary: Del Webb, a prominent builder of active adult communities for those 55 and older, recently marked the grand opening of Del Webb Barton Village in Metro Nashville. The event was well-attended with over 500 individuals coming from various parts of the country. Prospective buyers are now able to purchase homes in the community, with many actively touring the area. In collaboration with the Lebanon Wilson County Chamber of Commerce, the grand opening celebration commenced, reflecting a strong interest in the new community.
news.headline: Del Webb opens new active adult community in Metro Nashville with 500+ attendees; homes for sale, attracting buyers.

news.summary: In Aventura, Florida, Safe Pro Group Inc. (Nasdaq: SPAI) disclosed its success in having their white paper titled "Drone-Based AI for Landmine and UXO Detection and Mapping" chosen for display at the 2025 Annual Symposium on the Application of Geophysics to Engineering and Environmental Problems (SAGEEP), organized by The Environmental and Engineering Geophysical Society (EEGS). Safe Pro is recognized for its AI-powered security solutions and continues to make strides in the industry. Keep an eye out for the Company’s innovative contributions in the upcoming event.
news.headline: Safe Pro Group aims to expand AI datasets in geophysics at SAGEEP 2025 with their white paper on drone-based landmine detection.

news.summary: The groundbreaking ICONIC-LEAD study is the initial Phase 3 registrational trial to evaluate the safety and effectiveness of a systemic treatment in both adolescents and adults with moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis. Results indicate that 84% of adolescents who received the investigational treatment experienced improvements.
news.headline: Results from ICONIC-LEAD study indicate 75% clear skin rate in adolescents with psoriasis. Safety and efficacy of new pill.

news.summary: Clear Channel Outdoor has announced a new advertising initiative in Chicago as of April 10, 2025. The company is utilizing PRU's electric bus fleet to display large-scale advertisements in prominent locations across the city, including Michigan Avenue, Millennium Park, Grant Park, and Lake Michigan. This innovative approach allows brands to target desirable consumers throughout the day. Clear Channel Outdoor, a publicly traded company under the symbol NYSE: CCO, aims to capitalize on this opportunity to reach a significant audience in key Chicago areas.
news.headline: Clear Channel Outdoor now offers ad displays on PRU electric bus fleet in Chicago's key areas, targeting high-demand consumers.

news.summary: A cannabis brand focused on scientific innovation has launched its award-winning vape products in Missouri, enhancing its selection in the Midwest. The acclaimed Batch brand by Bud & Mary's is now available in varying sizes, with new options including 1-gram and 2-gram all-in-one vapes. This expansion brings a wider range of products to the market in Missouri, catering to the growing demand for high-quality cannabis items in the region. The move aims to meet the needs of consumers seeking innovative and diverse options in the cannabis industry.
news.headline: Bud & Mary's introduces 1g and 2g custom-filled vapes in Missouri, expanding its Midwest selection. #Cannabis #Expansion

news.summary: In Zug, Switzerland on April 10, 2025, Spirit Digital AG, a subsidiary of Spirit Blockchain Capital Inc. (CSE:SPIR / OTC:SPBCF / FRA:RTFB), has successfully obtained confirmed and official ticker listings for its initial suite of Exchange Traded Products (ETPs). The Spirit Ethereum Yield+ ETP and Spirit Solana Yield+ ETP are now listed on both the SIX Swiss Exchange and Deutsche Börse Xetra. This development follows the recent product launch announcement on March 27. These listings mark a significant milestone for the company as it aims to offer institutional-grade access to staking rewards through transparent and regulated investment options.
news.headline: Spirit Digital AG's Ethereum and Solana Yield+ ETPs secure ticker listings on SIX and Deutsche Börse, aiming to offer institutional-grade access to staking rewards. Symbol: SPIR (CSE), SPBCF (OTC), RTFB (FRA).
BlackRock suggests slightly favoring US stocks in portfolios amidst global uncertainty.

news.summary: The AM-001 Study marks a significant achievement for Galmed as they move towards Aramchol Meglumine, an enhanced version of their primary compound currently in advanced clinical stages. Aramchol Meglumine, a New Chemical Entity safeguarded by patents until 2035, is undergoing development for multiple purposes.
news.headline: Galmed reports positive Part 1 results from AM-001 study on Aramchol Meglumine, with NCE protected until 2035.

news.summary: Dr. Nancy Messier and Dr. Thierry Abribat have recently become part of Find Therapeutics to aid in its mission and expansion. The biopharmaceutical company based in MONTRÉAL, made this announcement on April 10, 2025. Find Therapeutics Inc. focuses on creating cutting-edge treatments for autoimmune disorders.
news.headline: Find Therapeutics adds 2 new directors, Dr. Nancy Messier and Dr. Thierry Abribat, for growth and mission support.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, on April 10, 2025, Qnovia, Inc. announced key appointments to its leadership team. Mario Danek has been named President and CEO, while James Watson has joined as the COO. Francesca Lanuza will serve as the Director of Regulatory Affairs, and Dr. Robert West has been appointed as the Chairman of the Scientific Advisory Board. These strategic appointments mark significant changes within the company as it navigates the pharmaceutical and medtech industries.
news.headline: Qnovia, Inc. announces leadership transition. Mario Danek appointed President and CEO. James Watson new COO. Dr. Robert West named Chairman. Francesca Lanuza appointed Director of Regulatory Affairs. #leadershiptransition #Qnovia #appointments

news.summary: In Belgrade, Montana on April 10, 2025, Bridger Aerospace Group Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BAER, BAERW) revealed that it has secured an exclusive-use contract from the State of Montana after a competitive bidding process. The contract entails utilizing a customized Daher Kodiak 100 aircraft for wildfire detection and mapping. Initially set for one year, the agreement includes the possibility of two extension years subject to state funding. The contract guarantees a minimum of 120 days of availability per year, amounting to a base annual worth of $648,000, with potential for additional days and flight hours beyond the base value.
news.headline: Bridger Aerospace awarded exclusive-use contract by State of Montana for wildfire detection aircraft, worth minimum $648,000/year.

news.summary: Ochsner has shown continued support for the advancement of SRP-001 as a top contender in the growing non-opioid treatment field with a follow-on investment. This investment reaffirms their commitment to South Rampart Pharma, Inc. (referred to as "South Rampart" or the "Company"), a clinical-stage biotechnology firm. The announcement was made on April 10, 2025, in New Orleans.
news.headline: South Rampart Pharma appoints Ochsner Health CEO Pete November to board; Ochsner commits to advancing SRP-001 in non-opioid space.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, NeOnc Technologies Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTHI), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for central nervous system (CNS) cancers and disorders, disclosed that Amir Heshmatpour, the Executive Chairman, has been named as the President of the company. Heshmatpour will continue as the Executive Chairman and will also undertake the duties of the President to drive the Company's strategic and clinical efforts forward.
news.headline: NeOnc Technologies Holdings, Inc. appoints Amir Heshmatpour as President in addition to his role as Executive Chairman, to drive growth.

news.summary: The SAFE platform, based in Palo Alto, California, has seen a surge in popularity within the insurance sector as the preferred method for streamlined and transparent cyber risk management during underwriting processes. This platform allows insurance brokers and carriers to enhance risk selection efficiently. The technology is quickly becoming the standard, offering a more effective and clear approach to cyber risk management in the industry.
news.headline: SAFE platform revolutionizing cyber risk management in insurance industry, 4 wins at Cyber Insurance Awards.

news.summary: A team of employee owners in Sheboygan has successfully doubled capacity to fulfill local demand for electrical, plumbing, and HVAC services. The grand opening of their new facility at 4212 High Tech Lane in Sheboygan, Wisconsin occurred on April 10, 2025. This expansion signifies a significant milestone, allowing the team to better serve the community by increasing its capabilities.
news.headline: DSG opens new facility in Sheboygan, WI doubling capacity to serve local demand in electrical, plumbing, HVAC.

news.summary: Wyld Works has recently unveiled their 2024 Impact Report, which showcases their dedication to social and environmental causes. This release comes from Portland, Oregon on April 10, 2025. As a prominent player in the cannabis edibles market, Wyld is focused on enhancing their Corporate Social Responsibility efforts. The report presents a detailed overview of the company's initiatives, emphasizing their commitment towards making a positive impact.
news.headline: Wyld introduces Wyld Works, a justice-focused program redefining enterprise and activism, releasing 2024 Impact Report.

news.summary: Howmet Aerospace, headquartered in Pittsburgh, has announced plans to host a webcast to disclose its first-quarter financial results for the year 2025. The company is set to provide important figures and insights during the webcast. This event will offer stakeholders and investors an opportunity to gain valuable information about the company's performance and outlook moving forward. The webcast is expected to attract a wide audience interested in Howmet Aerospace's financial standing and strategic direction.
news.headline: Howmet Aerospace in Pittsburgh plans to announce its Q1 2025 results via webcast.

news.summary: Renowned CPA Bruce A. Phillips, a strong advocate for cloud technology and a prominent figure in accounting technology, has recently been added to the Advisory Board of Trez.co, the first U.S. Latino tech payroll startup. The announcement was made by Trez, based in San Francisco, on April 10, 2025. This move signifies a key development for the growing company as it continues to establish itself within the industry.
news.headline: U.S. Latino Tech Startup Trez.co adds Cloud Accounting Pioneer Bruce A. Phillips to Advisory Board.

news.summary: Singapore-based CURRENC Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR), a leading fintech company providing AI solutions to financial institutions globally, announced on April 10, 2025, that Nasdaq has confirmed its compliance with the minimum market value of publicly held shares requirement. The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC (“Nasdaq”) informed CURRENC that for the last ten consecutive business days, its ordinary shares maintained a market value of publicly held shares (“MVPHS”) exceeding $5,000,000. This figure aligns with Nasdaq Global Market’s Listing Rule 5450(b)(1)(C), ensuring CURRENC's continued listing. Nasdaq has closed the matter, confirming CURRENC's adherence to the Rule.
news.headline: CURRENC Group Inc. regains Nasdaq compliance with $5,000,000 market value requirement after ten days, according to recent announcement.

news.summary: Eric Purcell, a partner-sales expert with a strong global go-to-market strategy background, has joined Semperis as Senior Vice President. The announcement was made on April 10, 2025, in Hoboken, New Jersey. Semperis specializes in AI-powered identity security and cyber resilience. This addition is expected to enhance the company's market presence and bolster its sales team.
news.headline: Semperis names Eric Purcell as Senior VP of Global Partner Sales and Alliances. Expertise in go-to-market strategy.

news.summary: VitalHub Corp. has recently disclosed the details of its planned acquisition of Induction Healthcare Group PLC. The agreement involves a recommended cash acquisition in which VitalHub will purchase all existing and future shares of Induction. The acquisition will be carried out through a court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement under Part 26 of the Companies Act 2006. As per the terms of the deal, each shareholder of Induction will receive £0.10 in cash for every share they own. This offer values Induction at around £9.7 million.
news.headline: VitalHub to acquire Induction Healthcare Group for £9.7 million in cash, shareholders to receive £0.10 per share.

news.summary: Alaska Airlines is providing festival attendees with a unique opportunity to unwind and recharge by offering festival upgrades and travel-related prizes. The airline, based in Seattle, announced on April 10, 2025 that it is amplifying its presence during the festival season as the designated airline for Coachella.
news.headline: Alaska Airlines offers Mileage Plan members a chance to win festival upgrades and prizes at Coachella and Stagecoach.

news.summary: Eon has developed a technology that enables customers to convert cloud backups into data lakes, facilitating the rapid implementation of AI strategies and smooth transitions to Google Cloud. The platform, based in New York, announced this advancement on April 10, 2025. With Eon's solution, businesses can enhance their capabilities and data storage efficiency, ultimately boosting their competitiveness in the market.
news.headline: Eon partners with Google Cloud to accelerate AI adoption, transform cloud backups into data lakes, and enable safer migration.

news.summary: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a leading developer of eco-friendly data centers for high-performance computing tasks like Bitcoin mining and AI, has recently released updates regarding its March 2025 project site operations. The company, listed on NASDAQ as SLNH, shared notable corporate and site-specific news. For detailed monthly performance metrics, interested parties can access the information on their website. In addition, Soluna provided insights into its 2024 Annual and Q4 Results, accompanied by other significant business-related announcements.
news.headline: Soluna Holdings gives March 2025 updates on green data centers, Bitcoin mining, AI, with financial results for 2024.

news.summary: In an effort to enhance its clinical development efforts for novel therapies targeting obesity and related cardiometabolic diseases, a company has elected David Grainger, Ph.D., as Chairman of Development and Meg Fitzgerald, J.D., as Chief Legal Officer. The strategic expansion is set to bolster Rivus's portfolio. The company, based in Charlottesville, Virginia, is taking significant steps towards advancing treatment options for these prevalent health conditions.
news.headline: Rivus Pharma hires new leaders, opens SF office prior to Phase 2 results in MASH. David Grainger, Ph.D., as Chairman of Development and Meg Fitzgerald, J.D., Chief Legal Officer appointed. Focus on obesity & cardiometabolic diseases.

news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on April 10, 2025, Nona Biosciences, an international biotech firm, revealed its partnership with another entity for research purposes. The company offers comprehensive services, encompassing target validation, antibody discovery, and preclinical research, under the "Idea to IND" framework.
news.headline: Nona Biosciences and Atossa Therapeutics partner on next-gen antibody therapies for breast cancer.

news.summary: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group (NASDAQ: BRAG, TSX: BRAG), a top global B2B iGaming content and technology provider, revealed the purchase of a significant equity stake and an exclusive content partnership agreement with RAPIDPLAY LTD, a specialized Brazilian game development studio. RapidPlay is recognized for its localized, high-quality online casino content designed for the Brazilian and Latin American market. The partnership will grant Bragg access to RapidPlay's unique games tailored to these markets.
news.headline: Bragg Gaming invests in Brazilian studio RapidPlay, specializing in localized online casino games for Latin America.

news.summary: In the year 2027, it is projected that capital intensity will increase to 14%, as reported in a recent study by Dell'Oro Group. The report, which provides market insights on telecommunications, security, networks, and data centers, indicates a significant growth trend. This data was disclosed in Redwood City, California, on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Telecom capex to decline 2% CAGR worldwide, with capital intensity expected to reach 14% by 2027 - Dell'Oro Group.

news.summary: In Seattle, the housing market is facing challenges amidst a swiftly changing economic environment, influenced by President Trump’s tariff measures, a volatile stock market, and higher prospects of a recession. A recent report from Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), a tech-based real estate brokerage, indicates significant financial uncertainty for both potential homebuyers and sellers. The market saw an uptick in homebuying interest in early April, as mortgage-purchase applications rose.
news.headline: Homebuyer demand improved, but economic uncertainties may affect sales. Tariff policies, rates, and recession fears at play.

news.summary: Lightspeed Commerce Inc., a leading commerce platform traded on both NYSE under the symbol LSPD and TSX under the same symbol, has disclosed its plan to release the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company, headquartered in Montreal, specializes in offering merchants a comprehensive omnichannel experience. This announcement was made on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Lightspeed Commerce Inc. to announce fiscal Q4 & full year 2025 results in conference call. NYSE: LSPD | TSX: LSPD.
